title: Ransomware targeting municipal infrastructure
mitigation: EDR deployment, network segmentation, offline backups, phishing awareness training, incident response playbook
notes: Increasing attacks on Canadian municipalities - see City of Hamilton, CDIC advisories. Score 20 = Very High (5x4).

title: Unpatched OT/SCADA vulnerabilities
mitigation: OT vulnerability scanning program, network segmentation (Purdue Model), vendor patch coordination, compensating controls (firewall rules)
notes: Legacy PLCs cannot be easily patched — compensating controls required

title: Phishing & credential compromise
mitigation: MFA enforcement, conditional access policies, quarterly phishing simulations, security awareness training
notes: Click rate improved from 12% to 4.2% over 12 months

title: Third-party vendor data breach
mitigation: Vendor risk assessment program, contractual security requirements, annual SOC 2 review, incident notification SLA

title: Insider threat — data exfiltration
asset: Social Services Case Management / HR Systems
mitigation: DLP policies, USB restrictions, CASB for cloud uploads, offboarding security checklist, UEBA monitoring
notes: MFIPPA compliance requires breach notification to IPC

title: Cloud misconfiguration (Azure / AWS)
mitigation: CSPM tooling (Defender for Cloud), IaC scanning, CIS Benchmark compliance, monthly configuration audits
notes: 3 misconfigurations found in last quarterly audit — all remediated

title: Disaster recovery plan gaps
mitigation: Quarterly DR testing program, updated RACI matrices, cross-training for recovery roles, RTO/RPO gap analysis
notes: 2 of 8 systems have untested DR plans

title: Legacy system end-of-life (Windows Server 2012/2016)
mitigation: Migration roadmap to Server 2022, extended security updates (ESU), network isolation for legacy systems
notes: 5 servers running EOL OS — 2 in production supporting GIS and traffic systems

title: Inadequate network segmentation
mitigation: Zero trust micro-segmentation project, VLAN restructuring, firewall rule optimization, OT/IT DMZ implementation
notes: OT network currently has limited segmentation from corporate IT

title: Compliance gaps — MFIPPA & Ontario Cyber Framework
mitigation: Annual privacy impact assessments, data classification program, encryption at rest/in transit, staff privacy training
notes: Last IPC audit: 2 minor findings resolved

title: Outdated security awareness training materials
mitigation: Content refresh scheduled, new phishing simulation vendor onboarded
notes: Current materials still valid but due for annual update

title: Physical access logging gaps at secondary facilities
mitigation: Access card system upgrade planned, visitor log digitization in progress
notes: Main campus already compliant — satellite offices pending
